title: Red Rising Trilogy Mega Summary! (All 3 Books, NO AI)
summary:
Everything you need to know about the Red Rising Trilogy — Red Rising, Golden Son, and Morning Star — in one video. No AI. Just a real human who read all three books breaking down the story, the characters, and what makes this series one of the best in modern sci-fi/fantasy.
This is my definitive summary and analysis of Pierce Brown's original trilogy. I did cover Book 1 in a previous video, but that video is now private — this is the one to watch. Whether you're catching up before Dark Age, need a refresher, or just want to see if this series is for you, you're in the right place.
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/DanielBGreene
⚠️ SPOILERS for all three books: Red Rising, Golden Son, and Morning Star.

title: Why Michael Moorcock HATED Tolkien
summary:
Michael Moorcock didn't just dislike Tolkien — he wrote an entire essay calling Lord of the Rings the literary equivalent of Winnie the Pooh. In "Epic Pooh," Moorcock argues that cozy, nostalgic fantasy isn't just bad writing — it's a political stance. And he had a lot to say about it.
You Can Read It Here: https://worldwithoutmoneyarg.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/moorcock-1978-epic-pooh-in-arena-2-anarchists-in-fiction-2011.pdf

title: The Greatest Book I Have Ever Read
summary:
You can get the book here: https://bookshop.org/a/89948/9780140449266 
The Count of Monte Cristo might be the greatest book ever written. Alexandre Dumas created something so perfect, so consuming, and so brutally satisfying that I genuinely feel different after reading it. In this video I'm breaking down why The Count of Monte Cristo deserves to be at the top of every reading list — and why if you haven't read it yet, you should let me convince your ignorant ass to read it with this deep dive.
